country_result:
Country: Guatemala
Coordinates: 14.6349, -90.5069
Reasoning: The combination of tapered concrete utility poles, rough-cast concrete drainage gutters, and specific residential architecture (yellow house with red trim and wrought-iron gates with decorative curls) is highly characteristic of the Northern Triangle, specifically Guatemala. While other Central American countries share similar infrastructure, the Meta Agent's detailed analysis of the window frames and gate styles strongly points toward Guatemala. The right-hand traffic and single solid yellow center line are consistent with Guatemalan road standards.
